title: scutellaria flabellulata
intro: Scutellaria flabellulata, also known as the Fan-leaved Skullcap or Chinese Skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria flabellulata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
